case_title: WILLIAMS, DAMON ,JR. VS BAKER, MARVALYNN T.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,288.73 FILED BY WILLIAMS, DAMON ,JR. AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, MARVALYNN T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, MARVALYNN T.
BY CERT MAIL. LETTER DOES NOT INDICATE NEW COURT DATE & CLERK DID NOT SEND OUT NOTICES OF NEW COURT DTE (COMPUTER OUT) PROBLEM: DEFT HAS LEFT COUNTRY
THAT DEFT IS IN JAPAN. ASKED HER TO CONVEY TO DEFT THAT SHE SHOULD ASK DEFT TO PREPARE A DEFENSE & SEND TO COURT. SAID DEFENSE WILL BE PUT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAKER, MARVALYNN T. CLERKS' OFFICE DID NOT SEND NOTICE (COMPUTER DOWN) DEFEND. SHOWED PROOF SERVED PLTFF BY CERT MAIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
